content: Planner, wrote SESSION-BRIEF.md at repo root: 10-domain Round Table (3 with history: ceo, cto, chief-of-staff; 7 'no cycles run yet'), hand-off playback for the 4 trails carrying Article 4 addressing, plain 'no hand-off record' note for the 2 older cto trails that predate it, and an Open Items section restating what Reflectors flagged without deciding any of it.

Planner, this cycle wrote only a new root-level file (SESSION-BRIEF.md, first-ever creation, not overwriting anything since it didn't exist) plus this trail's own files -- no catalog/, skills.json, marketplace.json, or other-domain SKILL.md touched.
